form.formComment: Didn't do much last start, 6th over 2150m at Cagnes-sur-Mer, beaten 25m by Manzana Era in 4yo fillies race on February 28 at $105. Before that 5th (25m) over 2650m at Marseille Vivaux, beaten 26m by Ma Copine Flac in 4yo fillies handicap on February 13 at $85. Others look better chances.

form.formComment: Recent form below what he is capable of. Last start 6th (25m) over 3000m at Marseille-Borely, beaten 40m by Mister Magic in 4yo colts and gelding handicap on March 20 at $5. The run previous unplaced over 2150m at Cagnes-sur-Mer well beaten by Mindfreak in 4yo colts and gelding race on February 28 at $21. Expecting a spike in form this time.
